nasb.text: And it happened that He was passing through the grainfields on the Sabbath, and His disciples began to make their way along while picking the heads of grain.

esv.text: One Sabbath he was going through the grainfields, and as they made their way, his disciples began to pluck heads of grain.

cnv.text: 有一次，在安息日，耶穌從麥田經過，他的門徒一面走路，一面摘麥穗。

ccb.text: 一个安息日，耶稣和门徒走过一片麦田，门徒一边走一边搓麦穗吃。

csbs.text: 有一次在安息日，耶稣从麦田经过，他的门徒们开始边走边摘麦穗。
